qa_pairs.question: How do users sign up for an Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can sign up for an Alliance account by going to the register link on the CCDB portal. It is required to accept certain policies and agreements, which can be reviewed on the Alliance website, to complete the account registration.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users view the policies and agreements they have accepted for their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: Once an Alliance account has been approved, users can view the agreements they have accepted at any time on CCDB by navigating to 'My Account --> Agreements'.

qa_pairs.question: What are the two main types of roles users can select when applying for an Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: There are two main types of roles users can select when applying for an Alliance account: sponsor roles, often referred to as Primary Investigators (PIs), and sponsored roles.
